_comment: NOXORA — Services that must NEVER be stopped or disabled.

protectedServices.name: RpcSs
protectedServices.reason: Core IPC infrastructure — disabling causes system failure

protectedServices.name: DcomLaunch
protectedServices.reason: Required for COM/DCOM — disabling causes system failure

protectedServices.name: RpcEptMapper
protectedServices.reason: Required for RPC — disabling causes system failure

protectedServices.name: EventLog
protectedServices.reason: Required for system diagnostics and security auditing

protectedServices.name: PlugPlay
protectedServices.reason: Required for hardware detection and driver loading

protectedServices.name: Power
protectedServices.reason: Required for power management

protectedServices.name: Schedule
protectedServices.reason: Required for Windows maintenance and updates

protectedServices.name: ProfSvc
protectedServices.reason: Required for user logon

protectedServices.name: CryptSvc
protectedServices.reason: Required for certificate validation and Windows Update

protectedServices.name: Winmgmt
protectedServices.reason: Required by NOXORA and many Windows subsystems

protectedServices.name: WinDefend
protectedServices.reason: System security — must never be disabled

protectedServices.name: MpsSvc
protectedServices.reason: Network security — must never be disabled

protectedServices.name: SecurityHealthService
protectedServices.reason: Security health monitoring

protectedServices.name: Dhcp
protectedServices.reason: Required for network connectivity

protectedServices.name: Dnscache
protectedServices.reason: Required for name resolution

protectedServices.name: NlaSvc
protectedServices.reason: Required for network profile and firewall rules

protectedServices.name: netprofm
protectedServices.reason: Required for network discovery

protectedServices.name: AudioSrv
protectedServices.reason: Required for all audio output

protectedServices.name: AudioEndpointBuilder
protectedServices.reason: Required for audio device management

protectedServices.name: MMCSS
protectedServices.reason: Required for audio/video scheduling and game performance

protectedServices.name: Spooler
protectedServices.reason: Can be stopped safely only when no printer is in use

protectedServices.name: LanmanWorkstation
protectedServices.reason: Required for SMB file sharing

protectedServices.name: LanmanServer
protectedServices.reason: Required for SMB file sharing

protectedServices.name: wuauserv
protectedServices.reason: Required for security patches — must not be disabled permanently

protectedServices.name: UsoSvc
protectedServices.reason: Orchestrates Windows Update — must not be disabled permanently

protectedServices.name: Sense
protectedServices.reason: EDR telemetry if licensed

protectedServices.name: StorSvc
protectedServices.reason: Required for storage device management

protectedServices.name: VaultSvc
protectedServices.reason: Required for credential storage

protectedServices.name: lsass
protectedServices.reason: Required for authentication — cannot be stopped
